# The Sawicki Group — llms.txt
# Twin Cities real estate — Minneapolis, Saint Paul, and surrounding communities.
# https://sawicki-group-web-43343667811.us-central1.run.app

> The Sawicki Group is a licensed real estate team in the Twin Cities area of Minnesota,
> specializing in Minneapolis and Saint Paul neighborhoods. Jim Sawicki is a licensed
> Minnesota real estate agent with Coldwell Banker Realty.

## Active Listings

Buyer-facing property detail pages with full specifications and AI-powered Q&A.

- /listings — All current listings index
- /listings/{id} — Individual property detail page

## Market Updates (Blog)

Weekly mortgage rate updates and Twin Cities market commentary, generated with live
Federal Reserve FRED data.

- /blog — All posts index
- /blog/{id} — Individual post

## Site Pages

- / — Homepage
- /about — About Jim Sawicki and The Sawicki Group
- /contact — Contact form and showing requests
- /search — Home search (MLS integration coming soon)
- /privacy — Privacy policy
